title: The Woman in the Hall
writer: G.B. Stern, Ian Dalrymple, Jack Lee
actors: Ursula Jeans, Jean Simmons, Cecil Parker
plot: A poor widow with two daughters augments her income by using her children to extort money. Visiting the houses of the rich people, they tell a sad story and beg for help. Then she meets a wealthy man who proposes marriage to her.
